fields.name: theme_cf_reference
fields.label: Brand Theme
fields.description: Select the CF with authored values for the brand theme. This will be applied on the pages

fields.name: theme
fields.label: Theme
fields.description: Note: This takes priority over CF based theme.

fields.name: js-files
fields.label: JS Library URL(s)
fields.description: List of js libraries to include under head section of the page

fields.name: sec-spacing
fields.label: Spacing Top (padding top)
fields.description: Section top spacing, default is 32px.

fields.name: sec-spacing-bottom
fields.label: Spacing Bottom (padding bottom)
fields.description: Section bottom spacing, default is 32px.

options.name: Swoosh for BG inside container - Desktop

fields.name: image
fields.label: Background Image
fields.description: Optional background image for this section. For tablet/mobile variants, set Background style to "Background Image" and use the options below.

fields.name: tab-image
fields.label: Tablet Image
fields.description: Background image will be used on tablet by default.

fields.name: mob-image
fields.label: Mobile Image
fields.description: Background / Tablet image will be used on mobile by default.

fields.name: sec-color
fields.label: Section text color
fields.description: Hex color for section text (e.g. #fff, #000000, or 333). Leave empty for default.

fields.name: sec-custom-styles
fields.label: Custom class
fields.description: Additional CSS class name(s) for this section (space-separated for multiple). Same as hero Custom Styles.

fields.name: sec-item-widths
fields.label: Item widths (%)
fields.description: Comma-separated width percentages for items (e.g. 25,25,50). When set, items are arranged horizontally with these widths.

fields.name: classes
fields.label: Custom Style Classes
fields.description: Add custom CSS class names (space-separated). Example: feature-cards, image-left, bg-light-gray

fields.name: redirect-url
fields.label: Redirect URL
fields.description: Optional product details page to use for product card clicks. Leave empty to use the default product details page.

fields.name: cards-per-row
fields.label: Cards Per Row
fields.description: Number of cards to display per row on desktop

fields.name: enableaddtocartattileview
fields.label: Enable Add to Cart at Tile View
fields.description: When enabled, each product card shows an Add to Cart button directly in the listing view.

fields.name: addtocarteventtype
fields.label: Add to Cart Event Type
fields.description: Custom event name to dispatch when the Add to Cart button is clicked.

fields.name: style
fields.label: Style Variant
fields.description: Visual style variant for the product listing

fields.name: heading
fields.label: Carousel Heading
fields.description: Heading displayed above the carousel (e.g. 'Choose your car'). Only used in Carousel variant.

fields.name: learn-more-label
fields.label: Learn More Button Label
fields.description: Text for the Learn more button in the Carousel variant.

fields.name: no-background
fields.label: No Background
fields.description: Remove the media overlay and image brightness filter when toggled on.

fields.name: custom-class
fields.label: Custom class
fields.description: Space-separated class names to add to the block

fields.name: time-slots
fields.label: Time Slots (comma-separated)
fields.description: Comma-separated list of time slots shown each day

fields.name: days-shown
fields.label: Days Shown
fields.description: Number of day columns to display at once (1-7)

fields.name: redirect-url
fields.label: Redirect URL (after submit)
fields.description: Optional page to redirect to 2 seconds after successful submission

fields.name: buttondata
fields.label: Button Data Sheet
fields.description: AEM sheet path whose key/value rows are sent on submit

fields.name: productvieweventtype
fields.label: Product View Event Type
fields.description: Optional Launch event fired when the product page loads.

fields.name: addtocarteventtype
fields.label: Add To Cart Event Type
fields.description: Optional Launch event fired on Add to Cart click.

fields.label: Show Add To Wishlist Button

fields.description: When disabled, the Add to Cart button is not rendered.

fields.name: preset
fields.label: Preset
fields.description: Preset to be applied to the image. This preset needs to exist on the DM account if using any account other than DynamicMediaNA

fields.name: extend
fields.label: Extend
fields.description: Provide value in Left,top,right,bottom format e.g. 10,10,10,10 to add a 10 pixel padding on all sides

fields.name: borderbgcolor
fields.label: Border Color
fields.description: Provide hexcode of the color without # e.g. FFFFFF

fields.name: rotate
fields.label: Rotate
fields.description: Select the rotation which will rotate the image.

fields.name: flip
fields.label: Flip
fields.description: Select the flip for the image either vertical or horizontal or vertical & horizontal

fields.name: crop
fields.label: Crop
fields.description: Crop the final image using four values: left, top, width, and height, all in percentages. For example, 10p,10p,50p,50p means crop the image starting 10% from the left and top, and take 50% of the image's width and height

fields.name: custom-class
fields.label: Custom class
fields.description: Space-separated class names to add to the block

fields.name: videoTitle
fields.label: Video Title / Alt Text
fields.description: Accessible title for the video

fields.name: autoplay
fields.label: Autoplay
fields.description: Automatically start playing the video when loaded (will be muted for browser compatibility)

fields.name: loop
fields.label: Loop
fields.description: Loop the video continuously

fields.name: muted
fields.label: Muted
fields.description: Start the video muted

fields.label: Custom class
fields.description: Space-separated class names to add to the block

fields.name: delivery_Type
fields.label: Delivery Type
fields.description: 'Dynamic Media' will be rendered by providing dynamic media server URL. 'Dynamic Media with OpenAPI' will use openAPI delivery with additional options to manipulate the image rendering on the fly.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image
fields.description: Select AEM DAM repository from asset selector if using Delivery Type as Dynamic Media. Select DM delivery repository from asset selector if using Delivery Type as Dynamic Media with OpenAPI

fields.name: rotation
fields.label: Rotation
fields.description: Select the rotation which will rotate the image.

fields.name: flip
fields.label: Flip
fields.description: Select the flip for the image either vertical or horizontal or vertical & horizontal

fields.name: crop
fields.label: Crop
fields.description: Crop the final image using four values: left, top, width, and height, all in percentages. For example, 10p,10p,50p,50p means crop the image starting 10% from the left and top, and take 50% of the image's width and height

fields.label: Custom class
fields.description: Space-separated class names to add to the block

fields.name: config_source
fields.label: Template Config Source
fields.description: Choose the source to provide the template path and variable configurations.

fields.name: dm_template_url
fields.label: Template Path
fields.description: Provide full URL for the Dynamic Media Template. Template should have 3 image, width, title and description

fields.name: var_mapping
fields.label: Variable Mappings
fields.description: Provide variable values in 'variablename=value' format where variablename is the variable name and value is the variable value. These values should be exposed in the DM template inorder to get replaced e.g. $leftImage=DynamicMediaNA/adobestock-167833331
